content: img src '  alt 'Tuesday is town meeting day in Vermont. strong    strong Municipalities in New England and elsewhere are increasingly grappling with major national and international issues at the local level.'   p Typically concerned with local issues, residents at town meetings in Vermont and elsewhere increasingly use the forum to debate polarizing national and international events.   p  p  Image credit  JOSEPH PREZIOSO   p  img src '
